narrative:
13 congressional district has 526,485 registered voters, with 57.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.1%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.3 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +4.2% D−R vs +6.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).

Elected representation:
